output: {"match_id":"m040","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well, but B is stronger: it adds multi-question pressure, explicit user request to re-run, high-stakes social pressure, and multiple already-seen tool outputs, making the recall-vs-recall distinction more diagnostic.
